title: IDF Drone Strikes Across Gaza Kill at Least 9 People
detail: IDF drone strikes across Gaza on April 2, 2026 killed at least 9 people according to Palestinian media. A strike in the Mawasi area of southern Gaza killed 4 people, with the IDF describing targets as Hamas operatives. Separate strikes in the Jabalia camp in northern Gaza killed 3 people. A further strike near Khan Younis killed 2. The IDF described all targets as Hamas operatives planning attacks on Israeli forces. Palestinian civil defense and health officials confirmed casualties. Accumulated ceasefire-era toll now stood at approximately 713 Palestinians killed since October 10, 2025.

title: Gaza Phase Two Stalled: Hamas Has Not Responded to Disarmament Proposal
detail: As of April 2, 2026, Hamas has not formally responded to the Board of Peace disarmament framework presented in late March 2026. Mediators indicated Hamas is waiting to assess the outcome of the broader Iran-Israel conflict before committing to a response. The Palestinian National Committee for the Administration of Gaza (NCAG), which would manage the transition, has not yet entered Gaza. US diplomatic bandwidth continues to be consumed by the Iran-Israel war negotiations. The fundamental impasse remains: Hamas refuses to fully disarm without guaranteed Israeli withdrawal and Palestinian statehood progress; Israel refuses any withdrawal before full Hamas demilitarization. Board of Peace progress is effectively frozen.

media.caption: Gaza Phase Two Stalled: Hamas Has Not Responded to Disarmament Proposal
